halts_checked_pass.name: HALT_092_SUPERSEDED
halts_checked_pass.details: Phase 0 search returned T36-S2-EXTRACTION (2026-05-02; halt T36_S2_RICHARDSON_DIVERGED) and T37-S2-EXTRACTION-POLYNOMIAL-AWARE (2026-05-02; T37_PARTIAL_a_1_PARTITIONS, D INFEASIBLE). Subsequent T37E + T37M chain identified: T37M-DIRECT-BOREL-D-EXTRACTION (2026-05-03; HALTED HALT_T37M_PADE_DIVERGENT). T37M is the closest prior Borel-Pade attempt; its outcome (RANK_LOSS at high orders M=200..800) is INFEASIBLE in the spec sense and the present 092 sweep operates in a fundamentally different small-(N,M) regime {6..18}. No supersession; no halt.

halts_checked_pass.name: HALT_092_NO_017L_SUBSTRATE
halts_checked_pass.details: T37E cached recurrence series at dps=400/N=5000 located and SHA-anchored for all four reps (V_quad/QL15/QL05/QL09). T35 constants (zeta_star, C_lsq, S1_imag) loaded at dps=250 and used to construct the Borel transform in u=t/zeta_star coords. Substrate file existence + readability verified by borel_pade_s2_runner.py main().

halts_checked_pass.name: HALT_092_BOREL_PATHOLOGICAL
halts_checked_pass.details: Borel transform b_n(u) := a_n * zeta_star^n / Gamma(n+1) constructed cleanly for all four reps; |b_n| decays geometrically as expected for analytic Borel transform with finite radius of convergence at u=1 (leading Stokes singularity). No NaN, no inf, no negative-dps residuals.

halts_checked_pass.name: HALT_092_DPS_INSUFFICIENT
halts_checked_pass.details: dps=300 ran to completion in 87.7 seconds for the full 4-rep x 49-cell sweep on laptop CPU. No memory pressure, no runtime issue, no precision exhaustion.

halts_checked_pass.name: HALT_092_UNEXPECTED_POSITIVE
halts_checked_pass.details: Phase D3 trigger checked. No rep achieved EXTRACTED classification (zero of 84 adjacent-cell pairs reached the dps/4 = 75 digit threshold; best agreements were 3-4 digits). No S_2 value with sign opposite to all priors emerged. Verdict for all four reps is PERMANENT_RESIDUAL_G6b, consistent with prior 017c/017e/017m findings.
